title: 1 step DFU - Language update  when only EB has update
scenario: 1-step DFU for language change succeeds when only Earbuds have a pending update and Charge Case is already on latest firmware on Voyager Free 60+
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app with an Osprey device (Voyager Free 60+ or Voyager Legend 50) where only the earbuds have a pending firmware update and the Charge Case is already on the latest version.
2. Navigate to Device Settings → Language and select a new language.
3. Tap "Update Now" and confirm the software update screen appears.
4. Complete the language change DFU (Device Firmware Update).
5. Verify the language change and DFU finish successfully and the earbuds are updated to the latest firmware.
6. Check the language on the Charge Case by navigating menus on the Charge Case touch screen, confirming the language was properly changed for the Charge Case.
expected: The language change DFU completes successfully. The earbuds are updated to the latest firmware. The Charge Case touch screen menus display the newly selected language.
